examples: Unless you have an asymmetric set-up, in which case the client can POST and/or PUT its order somewhere on the server.
Under these conditions, the lobsters developed asymmetric claws, half with crusher claws on the left, and half with crusher claws on the right.
The modern Internet would be dramatically different, and much less secure, without asymmetric encryption.
The ability to generate asymmetric return payoffs is enhanced when the market is volatile.
